Class SimulationSnapshot

java.lang.Object
simulation.entities.SimulationSnapshot
public class SimulationSnapshot extends Object
Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at a single time step.

Captures aggregate statistics (cell counts, average physical values) for later export to CSV via

invalid reference 
SimulationCsvExporter
.

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static SimulationSnapshot from(Grid grid, int step, String algorithmName, Wind wind)
      Builds a snapshot from the current simulation state.
      Parameters:
      grid - current grid
      step - current step number
      algorithmName - name of the active spread algorithm
      wind - current wind
      Returns:
      new snapshot
